_about: CC-5 external authority: the WebAssembly specification (and its conformance test suite). Each case is a WebAssembly module in text (.wat) form and whether the specification considers it a valid module. The CC-5 witness (crates/holospaces/tests/cc5_wasm.rs) assembles each module and checks holospaces' validator (holospaces::wasm::validate, over wasmparser's spec-validation algorithm) agrees, and that the substrate's closed host surface (spec §4.4: imports only from the `hologram` module) is enforced. See vv/PROVENANCE.md.

spec_valid.name: func-add
spec_valid.wat: (module (func (param i32 i32) (result i32) local.get 0 local.get 1 i32.add))
